name: AoV Loader - Cate
author: Cate (aka Nguyễn Xuân Tùng)
shortDescription: Tweak Injector for Liên Quân Mobile
localizedDescription: AoV Loader is a dedicated mod installer for Liên Quân Mobile (Arena of Valor). It allows you to easily inject modifications into the game with a clean and simple interface. Manage your game tweaks seamlessly and securely.
features: Easily install and manage game modifications
Remove all injected tweaks with a single tap

changes: Redesigned the app with a fresh, modern aesthetic.
Optimized the tweak injection process for Liên Quân Mobile.
Improved overall stability and user experience.
